caption: The video features an animated character that appears to be a robot or a stylized figure with blue horns and a red mohawk, dressed in a suit with a "Trade Santa" badge. The character is multitasking, holding a phone to one ear, a piece of paper in one hand, and another document in the other, while sitting at a desk with a laptop. Speech bubbles above the character's head display the words "BUY" and "SELL," suggesting a focus on trading activities. To the right of the character, a clock icon with the text "24/7" indicates continuous operation. As the video progresses, the numbers "24/7" disappear, leaving only the clock icon, emphasizing the ongoing nature of the trading activities. The background is a solid yellow color, and the logo "Cointelegraph" is visible in the top right corner, indicating the source or context of the content.
